name: Zagara
description: A Summoner who provides lots of vision of the battleground.
title: Broodmother of the Swarm
info: If Kerrigan is the Queen of the Zerg, then Zagara is the mother of the brood. Cunning and tenacious, she commands her minions on the field of battle. Encounter her brood and beware: Mess with her children, and you answer to mama.

Zagara.name: Baneling Barrage
Zagara.description: Launch 2 Banelings that deal 80 (+4% per level) damage to enemies they hit.  Stores up to 2 charges.

Zagara.name: Hunter Killer
Zagara.description: Summon a Hydralisk to attack a single target, dealing 71 (+5% per level) damage per second. The Hydralisk loses Health over 10 seconds, and has 450 (+4.5% per level) Health.

Zagara.name: Infested Drop
Zagara.description: Bombard target area with a Zerg Drop Pod for 140 (+4% per level) damage.  The pod spawns 2 Roachlings that deal 30 (+4% per level) damage per second and lose Health over 10 seconds.

Zagara.name: Nydus Network
Zagara.description: Summon a Nydus Worm on Creep anywhere that Zagara has vision. Zagara can enter a Nydus Worm and travel to any other Nydus Worm by right-clicking near it. While inside a Nydus Worm, Zagara regenerates 10% Health and Mana per second.  Stores up to 2 charges. Maximum of 4 Nydus Worms at a time.  Passive: Creep spreads 15% farther.  Passive: While on Creep, each Basic Attack reduces all of Zagara's cooldowns by 0.4 seconds.

Zagara.name: Devouring Maw
Zagara.description: Summon a Devouring Maw that devours enemies for 4 seconds. Devoured enemies cannot fight and take 94 (+4% per level) damage per second.  Usable on Unstoppable enemies.

Zagara.name: Creep Tumor
Zagara.description: Lay a Creep Tumor that generates Creep. While on Creep, Zagara moves 20% faster and her summons move 30% faster. Tumors lose Health over 250 seconds and reveal the surrounding area while active.  Stores up to 3 charges.

1.name: Volatile Acid
1.description: Banelings can travel 50% further before exploding.

1.name: Corpse Feeders
1.description: Reduces the cooldown of Infested Drop by 3 seconds and Roachlings have 30% more Health.

1.name: Infest
1.description: Nearby Ranged Minions deal an additional 100% damage, plus an additional 1% per 1000 Siege damage Zagara has dealt. Can be toggled on or off.

4.name: Envenomed Spines
4.description: Activate to have Zagara's next Basic Attack apply 230 (+4% per level) damage over 5 seconds.

4.name: Medusa Blades
4.description: Basic Attacks deal 33% damage to three nearby targets.

4.name: Serrated Spines
4.description: Quest: Each Basic Attack against a Hero increases Zagara's Attack Damage by 0.2%.

7.name: Baneling Massacre
7.description: Gain 2 additional charges of Banelings Barrage, but increase its cooldown by 2 seconds.

7.name: Viscous Acid
7.description: Banelings Slow enemies by 25% for 2.5 seconds.

7.name: Bile Drop
7.description: Quest: Passively increases the radius of Infested Drop by 20%.  Reward: After hitting 12 Heroes with Infested Drop, it spawns an additional Roachling.

10.name: Devouring Maw
10.description: Summon a Devouring Maw that devours enemies for 4 seconds. Devoured enemies cannot fight and take 94 (+4% per level) damage per second.  Usable on Unstoppable enemies.

10.name: Nydus Network
10.description: Summon a Nydus Worm on Creep anywhere that Zagara has vision. Zagara can enter a Nydus Worm and travel to any other Nydus Worm by right-clicking near it. While inside a Nydus Worm, Zagara regenerates 10% Health and Mana per second.  Stores up to 2 charges. Maximum of 4 Nydus Worms at a time.  Passive: Creep spreads 15% farther.  Passive: While on Creep, each Basic Attack reduces all of Zagara's cooldowns by 0.4 seconds.

13.name: Hydralisk Transfusion
13.description: Zagara is healed for 60% of the damage dealt by Hunter Killers' Basic Attacks to Heroes.

13.name: Protective Coating
13.description: While on Creep, Zagara gains 20 Armor, taking 20% less damage.

13.name: Spell Shield
13.description: Every 30 seconds, gain 50 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 50%.  Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.

16.name: Corrosive Saliva
16.description: When attacking Heroes, Hunter Killers and Roachlings deal additional damage equal to 1.5% of their maximum Health.

16.name: Mutalisk
16.description: Reduce the cooldown of Hunter Killer by -0 seconds. Hunter Killer now spawns a Mutalisk. Mutalisks have a bounce attack, lose Health over 42 seconds, and have 420 (+4.5% per level) Health.

16.name: Jagged Barbs
16.description: While on Creep, Zagara gains 50% more Basic Attack damage and her attack range is increased by 1.1.

20.name: Tyrant Maw
20.description: Devouring Maw deals 50% more damage. Takedowns reduce its cooldown by 25 seconds.

20.name: Endless Creep
20.description: Increase Creep Tumor's cast range from 2.5 to 50. Creep Tumors now last 600 seconds. While on Creep, Zagara gains an additional 10% Movement Speed.

20.name: Broodmother
20.description: Every 3rd Basic Attack also launches a Baneling towards the target.  Passive: Gain 20% bonus Attack Speed.

20.name: Pack Instinct
20.description: Zagara and her summons deal 20% more damage to enemies attacked by a Hunter Killer in the last 2 seconds.

tooltipMarkup.GenericSpellShieldTalent: Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,SpellShieldCooldown,Duration"/></c> seconds, gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,SpellShieldActive,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/></c> Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,SpellShieldActive,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds, reducing the damage taken by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,SpellShieldActive,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/>%</c>.<n/><n/>Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.
tooltipMarkup.ZagaraBanelingBarrage: Launch <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,SummonBanelingsPersistent,PeriodCount" player="0"/> </c>Banelings that deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZagaraBanelingExplodeDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies they hit.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,ZagaraBanelingBarrage,Cost.Charge.CountMax" player="0"/></c> charges.
tooltipMarkup.ZagaraBanelingBarrageBanelingMassacreTal: Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> additional charges of Banelings Barrage, but increase its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,ZagaraMasteryBanelingMassacre,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ZagaraBanelingBarrageVolatileAcidTalent: Banelings can travel <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> further before exploding.
tooltipMarkup.ZagaraBroodmother: Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZagaraBanelingBarrageBroodmotherTalentTokenCounter,Max"/>rd</c> Basic Attack also launches a Baneling towards the target.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> bonus Attack Speed.
tooltipMarkup.ZagaraCorrosiveSalivaHunterKillerTalent: When attacking Heroes, Hunter Killers and Roachlings deal additional damage equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZagaraHunterKillerBileDropCorrosiveSalivaPercentDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]*100"Precision="2"/>%</c> of their maximum Health.
tooltipMarkup.ZagaraCreepTumor: Lay a Creep Tumor that generates Creep. While on Creep, Zagara moves <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZagaraOnCreepSpeedBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100" player="0"/>%</c> faster and her summons move <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(Unit,ZagaraHydralisk,SpeedMultiplierCreep)-100"/>%</c> faster. Tumors lose Health over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Unit,ZagaraCreepTumor,LifeMax/Unit,ZagaraCreepTumor,LifeRegenRate" player="0"/></c> seconds and reveal the surrounding area while active.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,ZagaraSummonCreepTumor,Cost.Charge.CountMax"/></c> charges.
tooltipMarkup.ZagaraCreepTumorEndlessCreepTalent: Increase Creep Tumor's cast range from <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,ZagaraSummonCreepTumor,Range" player="0" precision="1"/></c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,ZagaraMasteryEndlessCreep,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[2].Value+Abil,ZagaraSummonCreepTumor,Range" player="0"/></c>. Creep Tumors now last <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZagaraCreepTumorEndlessCreepLife,Duration"/></c> seconds. While on Creep, Zagara gains an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,ZagaraMasteryEndlessCreep,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value*100" precision="1"/>%</c> Movement Speed.
tooltipMarkup.ZagaraCreepTumorJaggedBarbs: While on Creep, Zagara gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,ZagaraWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[JaggedBarbs].Modifier"/>%</c> more Basic Attack damage and her attack range is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,ZagaraJaggedBarbsTalent,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"precision="1"/></c>.
tooltipMarkup.ZagaraCreepTumorProtectiveCoating: While on Creep, Zagara gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZagaraProtectiveCoatingCarry,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor, taking <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZagaraProtectiveCoatingCarry,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/>%</c> less damage.
tooltipMarkup.ZagaraDevouringMaw: Summon a Devouring Maw that devours enemies for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Devoured enemies cannot fight and take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DevouringMawSustainedDamage,Amount"/></c> damage per second.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Usable on Unstoppable enemies.</c>
tooltipMarkup.ZagaraDevouringMawTyrantMawTalent: Devouring Maw deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,ZagaraMasteryTyrantMaw,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/>%</c> more damage. Takedowns reduce its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1*Effect,DevouringMawTyrantMawMasteryModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ZagaraEnvenomedSpinesTalent: Activate to have Zagara's next Basic Attack apply <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZagaraWeaponEnvenomedSpinesPeriodicDamage,Amount*5"/></c> damage over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZagaraEnvenomedSpinesDebuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ZagaraHunterKiller: Summon a Hydralisk to attack a single target, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZagaraHydraliskRangedDamage,Amount"/></c> damage per second. The Hydralisk loses Health over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Unit,ZagaraHydralisk,LifeMax/Unit,ZagaraHydralisk,LifeRegenRate" player="0"/></c> seconds, and has <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Unit,ZagaraHydralisk,LifeMax"/></c> Health.
tooltipMarkup.ZagaraHunterKillerMutaliskTalent: Reduce the cooldown of Hunter Killer by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,ZagaraMasteryMutalisk,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"/></c> seconds. Hunter Killer now spawns a Mutalisk. Mutalisks have a bounce attack, lose Health over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Unit,ZagaraMutalisk,LifeMax/Unit,ZagaraMutalisk,LifeRegenRate" player="0"/></c></c> seconds, and have <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Unit,ZagaraMutalisk,LifeMax"/></c> Health.

tooltipMarkup.ZagaraInfest: Nearby Ranged Minions deal an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZagaraInfestBuff,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]*100"Player="0"/>%</c> damage, plus an additional<c val="#TooltipNumbers"> 1%</c> per <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1000</c> Siege damage Zagara has dealt. Can be toggled on or off.
tooltipMarkup.ZagaraInfestedDrop: Bombard target area with a Zerg Drop Pod for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZagaraInfestedDropDamage,Amount"/></c> damage. <n/><n/>The pod spawns <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,InfestedDropCreateSpawnPersistent,PeriodCount" player="0"/></c> Roachlings that deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZagaraRoachAttackDamage,Amount"/></c> damage per second and lose Health over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Unit,ZagaraRoach,LifeMax/Unit,ZagaraRoach,LifeRegenRate" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ZagaraInfestedDropBileDropTalent: Quest: Passively increases the radius of Infested Drop by 20%.Reward: After hitting Heroes with Infested Drop, it spawns an additional Roachling.
tooltipMarkup.ZagaraInfestedDropCorpseFeedersTalent: Reduces the cooldown of Infested Drop by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,ZagaraMasteryCorpseFeeders,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds and Roachlings have <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,ZagaraInfestedDropCorpseFeedersRoachHealthBuff,Modification.VitalMaxFractionArray[Life]"/>%</c> more Health.
tooltipMarkup.ZagaraMedusaBladesTalent: Basic Attacks deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers">33%</c> damage to three nearby targets.
tooltipMarkup.ZagaraNydusNetwork: Summon a Nydus Worm on Creep anywhere that Zagara has vision. Zagara can enter a Nydus Worm and travel to any other Nydus Worm by right-clicking near it. While inside a Nydus Worm, Zagara regenerates <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZagaraEnterNydusWormCreateHealer,RechargeVitalFraction*100*5"/>%</c> Health and Mana per second.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,ZagaraSummonNydusWorm,Cost.Charge.CountMax"/></c> charges. Maximum of <c val="#TooltipNumbers">4 </c>Nydus Worms at a time.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Creep spreads <c val="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> farther. <n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> While on Creep, each Basic Attack reduces all of Zagara's cooldowns by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ZagaraNydusNetworkModifyCooldowns,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ZagaraPackInstinct: Zagara and her summons deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,ZagaraWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[PackInstinct].Modifier"/>%</c> more damage to enemies attacked by a Hunter Killer in the last <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZagaraHunterKillerPackInstinctsTalentTargetMarker,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ZagaraSerratedSpinesTalent: Quest: Each Basic Attack against a Hero increases Zagara's Attack Damage by %.
tooltipMarkup.ZagaraViscousAcid: Banelings Slow enemies by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,ZagaraBanelingBarrageTalentViscousAcidSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZagaraBanelingBarrageTalentViscousAcidSlow,Duration"precision="2"/></c> seconds.
